blocker_assertion_policy.reason: Knowledge-asset blockers can be resolved by authorized repairs. Regression tests should fail only when the current inventory and runtime report disagree, or when a known critical blocker disappears without an explicit repair record.
resolved_historical_blocker_classes: legacy Unihan.zip invalid archive when canonical Unihan2.zip passes
blocker_assertion_policy.review_required_semantics: A REVIEW_REQUIRED source gate permits read-only evidence-index design. It does not permit formal scoring, CNBE row writes, or database reconstruction.
blocker_assertion_policy.test_rule: assert inventory consistency and named critical blockers

decision.reason: Runtime logic passes, but source evidence mapping and review-required asset notes must be handled before batch scoring or database reconstruction.

checkpoint_resume_gate.message: Checkpoint reports a complete no-blocker scan and a resume offset after the final row.

cnbe32_carrier_separation_gate.message: CNBE32 bitfield review is separated from Unicode identity and cannot silently repair rows.

full_catalog_pre_gf0017_gate.message: Full catalog preparation passes schema, sample, and Unicode identity gates.

gf0017_status_preservation_gate.message: GF0017 scoring preserves EVIDENCE_GAP, REVIEW_REQUIRED, and repair-candidate statuses.

knowledge_asset_stop_gate.message: Knowledge assets preserve a gated state before scoring or database generation.

legacy_structure_localization_gate.message: All legacy English structure labels are localized and preserved as review signals.

unicode_first_agent_gate.message: 20,902 legacy CNBE rows have unique Unicode identity and no Unicode blocker.
